examples.sentence: 窓を開けっぱなしにして、部屋が寒くなってしまった。
examples.translation: I left the window open, and the room got cold.
examples.translationEn: I left the window open, and the room got cold
examples.romaji: Mado o akeppanashi ni shite, heya ga samuku natte shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I left the window open, and the room got cold

examples.sentence: 彼は音楽を聴くのが好きで、いつもイヤホンをつけっぱなしです。
examples.translation: He loves listening to music and always has his earphones on.
examples.translationEn: He loves listening to music and always has his earphones on
examples.romaji: Kare wa ongaku o kiku no ga suki de, itsumo iyahon o tsukeppanashi desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He loves listening to music and always has his earphones on

examples.sentence: 子供はおもちゃを床に置きっぱなしで、片付けなかった。
examples.translation: The child left the toys on the floor and didn’t put them away.
examples.translationEn: The child left the toys on the floor and didn’t put them away
examples.romaji: Kodomo wa omocha o yuka ni okippanashi de, katazukenakatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The child left the toys on the floor and didn’t put them away

examples.sentence: 昨夜は忙しかったので、テレビをつけっぱなしにして寝てしまった。
examples.translation: I was busy last night, so I left the TV on and fell asleep.
examples.translationEn: I was busy last night, so I left the TV on and fell asleep
examples.romaji: Sakuya wa isogashikatta node, terebi o tsukeppanashi ni shite nete shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I was busy last night, so I left the TV on and fell asleep

examples.sentence: 彼女は大人っぽい服を着ている。
examples.translation: She’s wearing clothes that look mature.
examples.translationEn: She’s wearing clothes that look mature
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa otonappoi fuku o kite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She’s wearing clothes that look mature

examples.sentence: この説明は分かりにくっぽい。
examples.translation: This explanation seems hard to understand.
examples.translationEn: This explanation seems hard to understand
examples.romaji: Kono setsumei wa wakari nikuppoi.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This explanation seems hard to understand

examples.sentence: 彼は疲れたっぽい顔をしている。
examples.translation: He has a face that looks tired.
examples.translationEn: He has a face that looks tired
examples.romaji: Kare wa tsukareta ppoi kao o shite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He has a face that looks tired

examples.sentence: この部屋は寒っぽい感じがする。
examples.translation: This room feels kind of chilly.
examples.translationEn: This room feels kind of chilly
examples.romaji: Kono heya wa samuppoi kanji ga suru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This room feels kind of chilly

examples.sentence: こんなに忙しいのに、無理に遊んでいられない。
examples.translation: I'm so busy that I can't afford to just play around.
examples.translationEn: Im so busy that I cant afford to just play around
examples.romaji: Konna ni isogashii noni, muri ni asonde irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im so busy that I cant afford to just play around

examples.sentence: 寒すぎて、外で待っていられない。
examples.translation: It's too cold; I can't keep waiting outside.
examples.translationEn: Its too cold; I cant keep waiting outside
examples.romaji: Samusugite, soto de matte irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its too cold; I cant keep waiting outside

examples.sentence: この問題は重要だから、放っておいていられない。
examples.translation: This issue is too important to ignore.
examples.translationEn: This issue is too important to ignore
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa jūyō dakara, houtte oite irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This issue is too important to ignore

examples.sentence: 彼女の態度が我慢できず、黙っていられない。
examples.translation: I can't stand her attitude, so I can't stay silent.
examples.translationEn: I cant stand her attitude, so I cant stay silent
examples.romaji: Kanojo no taido ga gaman dekizu, damatte irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I cant stand her attitude, so I cant stay silent

examples.sentence: こんなに暑くてかなわない。
examples.translation: I can’t stand this heat.
examples.translationEn: I can’t stand this heat
examples.romaji: Konnani atsukute kanawanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t stand this heat

examples.sentence: 彼の話は失礼すぎてかなわない。
examples.translation: His remarks are so rude I can’t put up with them.
examples.translationEn: His remarks are so rude I can’t put up with them
examples.romaji: Kare no hanashi wa shitsurei sugite kanawanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: His remarks are so rude I can’t put up with them

examples.sentence: 映画があまりに感動的で、忘れられなくてかなわない。
examples.translation: The movie was so moving that I can’t stand how it stays on my mind.
examples.translationEn: The movie was so moving that I can’t stand how it stays on my mind
examples.romaji: Eiga ga amari ni kandō-teki de, wasurerarenakute kanawanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The movie was so moving that I can’t stand how it stays on my mind

examples.sentence: 彼女の笑顔がまぶしくてかなわない。
examples.translation: Her smile is so dazzling that it’s overwhelming.
examples.translationEn: Her smile is so dazzling that it’s overwhelming
examples.romaji: Kanojo no egao ga mabushikute kanawanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Her smile is so dazzling that it’s overwhelming

examples.sentence: 宿題をしてからでないと、遊びに行けません。
examples.translation: You cannot go play until you’ve finished your homework.
examples.translationEn: You cannot go play until you’ve finished your homework
examples.romaji: Shukudai o shite kara denai to, asobi ni ikemasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You cannot go play until you’ve finished your homework

examples.sentence: 食事をしてからでないと、デザートを食べられません。
examples.translation: You cannot eat dessert until after having a meal.
examples.translationEn: You cannot eat dessert until after having a meal
examples.romaji: Shokuji o shite kara denai to, dezāto o taberaremasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You cannot eat dessert until after having a meal

examples.sentence: チケットを買ってからでないと、映画を見られません。
examples.translation: You can’t watch the movie until after you buy a ticket.
examples.translationEn: You can’t watch the movie until after you buy a ticket
examples.romaji: Chiketto o katte kara denai to, eiga o miraremasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You can’t watch the movie until after you buy a ticket

examples.sentence: 試験が終わってからでないと、休みを取れません。
examples.translation: You can’t take time off until the exam is over.
examples.translationEn: You can’t take time off until the exam is over
examples.romaji: Shiken ga owatte kara denai to, yasumi o toremasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You can’t take time off until the exam is over

examples.sentence: 勉強してこそ、テストに合格できる。
examples.translation: Only when you study can you pass the test.
examples.translationEn: Only when you study can you pass the test
examples.romaji: Benkyō shite koso, tesuto ni gōkaku dekiru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Only when you study can you pass the test

examples.sentence: 素直になってこそ、相手の気持ちが分かります。
examples.translation: Only when you’re honest can you understand the other person’s feelings.
examples.translationEn: Only when you’re honest can you understand the other person’s feelings
examples.romaji: Sunao ni natte koso, aite no kimochi ga wakarimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Only when you’re honest can you understand the other person’s feelings

examples.sentence: 静かでこそ、心が落ち着く。
examples.translation: Only in silence can one’s mind be at peace.
examples.translationEn: Only in silence can one’s mind be at peace

examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Only in silence can one’s mind be at peace

examples.sentence: 友達でこそ、お互いに助け合うのは当然だ。
examples.translation: Precisely because we’re friends, it’s natural to help each other.
examples.translationEn: Precisely because we’re friends, it’s natural to help each other

examples.sentence: 今日は暇で(は)しょうがない。
examples.translation: I’m extremely bored today.
examples.translationEn: I’m extremely bored today
examples.romaji: Kyō wa hima de shō ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I’m extremely bored today

examples.translation: This heat is absolutely unbearable.
